response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Highly accurate phonetic matches between the live vocal performance and the reference lyrics for '群青讃歌' (Gunjou Sanka) and '六兆年と一夜物語' (Rokuchounen to Ichiya Monogatari).
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the lyrics reference for spelling accuracy and semantic flow, adjusting where the live singers made stylistic changes (such as replacing 'satto' with 'setsunaku' at 00:19.4).
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly timed to vocal entries to avoid cascading delays, with a visual-only subtitle block added during the transition at 04:28.500 to capture the on-screen song title card of the second song.

subtitles.original: 繋がっていたいって 信じられる言葉
subtitles.english: "I want to stay connected" is a word I can believe in,

subtitles.original: だってもう昨日の僕らにおさらば
subtitles.english: because we've already said goodbye to the us of yesterday.

subtitles.original: 青い春を過ごした
subtitles.english: The blue spring we spent together...

subtitles.original: 遠い稲妻
subtitles.english: ...and the distant lightning.

subtitles.original: 切なく泣いて 前だけを向けたら
subtitles.english: If only I could cry sadly and look ahead,

subtitles.original: きっとどんなに楽になれていたろうな
subtitles.english: I wonder how much easier things would have been.

subtitles.original: この心を揺らした 一縷の望みは
subtitles.english: This faint hope that shook my heart...

subtitles.original: ないものねだりは辞めた 未完成人間
subtitles.english: ...I've stopped wishing for what I can't have. An incomplete human,

subtitles.original: 素晴らしき世界だけが
subtitles.english: only this wonderful world...

subtitles.original: 答えを握ってる
subtitles.english: ...holds the answer.

subtitles.original: 諦めてしまうほど この先沢山の
subtitles.english: Even to the point of giving up, so many...

subtitles.original: 後悔が君を待ってるけど
subtitles.english: ...regrets are waiting for you ahead, but...

subtitles.original: もうない 迷いはしないよ
subtitles.english: ...no more, I won't get lost anymore!

subtitles.original: この傷も愛しく 思えてしまうほど
subtitles.english: To the point where I come to love these wounds too,

subtitles.original: 重ねてしまうよ
subtitles.english: I'll keep overlapping them,

subtitles.original: 不格好なまんまでいいから
subtitles.english: because it's okay to stay imperfect!

subtitles.original: 走れ その歩幅で
subtitles.english: Run, at that pace!

subtitles.original: 走れ 声轟かせてくれ
subtitles.english: Run, let your voice roar!

subtitles.original: 期待と不安を同じくらい抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Embrace both expectations and anxieties equally,

subtitles.original: 君と今を紡ぐ
subtitles.english: spinning the present with you...

subtitles.original: 未来照らして
subtitles.english: ...and lighting up the future.

subtitles.original: 顔も名前も知らない僕たちが
subtitles.english: We, who don't even know each other's faces or names,

subtitles.original: たった1つの音をかき鳴らす
subtitles.english: strum a single sound.

subtitles.original: いたずらみたいな奇跡のような刹那
subtitles.english: A fleeting moment, like a prank, like a miracle,

subtitles.original: あっという間に流れる時が
subtitles.english: and time flows by in the blink of an eye.

subtitles.original: ありのままで在り続ける怖さが
subtitles.english: The fear of continuing to remain as I am...

subtitles.original: 失った時間は取り戻せないけれど
subtitles.english: ...we can't take back the lost time, but...

subtitles.original: 過去を振り返ってばかりじゃ保存
subtitles.english: If you only look back at the past...

subtitles.original: 泣いたっていいんだ
subtitles.english: ...it's okay to cry!

subtitles.original: 悔しさと痛みだけが
subtitles.english: Because only frustration and pain...

subtitles.original: 君を肯定するから
subtitles.english: ...will affirm who you are.

subtitles.original: 大人になったら 忘れてしまうの保存
subtitles.english: Will you forget it when you grow up?

subtitles.original: 君との約束をした場所は
subtitles.english: The place where we made our promise...

subtitles.original: もうない 覚えていたいよ
subtitles.english: ...is gone now, but I want to remember it.

subtitles.original: 思い出も愛しく 思えてしまうほど保存
subtitles.english: To the point where I come to love these memories too,

subtitles.original: 重ねてしまうよ
subtitles.english: I'll keep overlapping them,

subtitles.original: 不格好なまんまでいいから
subtitles.english: because it's okay to stay imperfect.

subtitles.original: その声はどこまでもなり響いて
subtitles.english: Let that voice ring out forever,

subtitles.original: 確かな理由を抱いてここまで来たんだ
subtitles.english: I've come this far holding onto a certain reason,

subtitles.original: まだ終わらない旅路なんだ
subtitles.english: this is a journey that hasn't ended yet.

subtitles.original: いつしか想いは形になる
subtitles.english: Someday, our feelings will take shape.

subtitles.original: この真っ白に染まる朝 忘れられないまま
subtitles.english: Covered in this pure white morning, unable to forget,

subtitles.original: だから
subtitles.english: and so...

subtitles.original: 諦めてしまうほど
subtitles.english: Even to the point of giving up, so many...

subtitles.original: この先沢山の
subtitles.english: ...regrets are waiting for you ahead, but...

subtitles.original: もうない 迷いはしないよ
subtitles.english: ...no more, I won't get lost anymore!

subtitles.original: かけがえのないもの
subtitles.english: Something irreplaceable...

subtitles.original: 溢れてしまうよ
subtitles.english: ...is overflowing.

subtitles.original: 答えは君のその手の中に
subtitles.english: The answer is right there in your hands,

subtitles.original: 離さないで
subtitles.english: so don't let it go.

subtitles.original: 物語は一歩前へ
subtitles.english: The story takes a step forward.

subtitles.original: 諦めてしまうほど
subtitles.english: Even to the point of giving up, so many...

subtitles.original: この先沢山の
subtitles.english: ...regrets are waiting for you ahead, but...

subtitles.original: 後悔が君を待ってるけど
subtitles.english: ...no more, I won't get lost anymore!

subtitles.original: もうない 迷いはしないよ
subtitles.english: To the point where I come to love these wounds too,

subtitles.original: この傷も愛しく 思えてしまうほど
subtitles.english: I'll keep overlapping them,

subtitles.original: 重ねてしまうよ
subtitles.english: because it's okay to stay imperfect!

subtitles.original: 不格好なまんまでいいから
subtitles.english: Run, at that pace!

subtitles.original: 走れ その歩幅で保存
subtitles.english: Run, let your voice roar!

subtitles.original: 走れ 声轟かせてくれ
subtitles.english: Embrace both expectations and anxieties equally,

subtitles.original: 期待と不安を同じくらい抱きしめて
subtitles.english: spinning the present with you...

subtitles.original: 君と今を紡ぐ
subtitles.english: ...and lighting up the future.

subtitles.original: 未来照らして
subtitles.english: 未来照らして

subtitles.original: 六兆年と一夜物語
subtitles.english: [Song: Six Trillion Years and an Overnight Story]

subtitles.original: 名も無い時代の集落の
subtitles.english: In a village from a nameless era,

subtitles.original: 名も無い幼い少年の
subtitles.english: there was a nameless, young boy.

subtitles.original: 誰も知らない おとぎばなし
subtitles.english: A fairy tale that no one knows.
